secondaryAuthors.name: Editorial
secondaryAuthors.restriction: ONLY for non-operational city-guide content (e.g., Sultanahmet history primers). Forbidden on commercial pages.

Captain Ahmet logbook (data/captain-log/ — TO BE CREATED)
Boarding zaman dağılımı dataset (postgres: Reservation → confirmedAt vs departureAt — TO BE EXTRACTED)

data/captain-log/2026-06.md — Captain Ahmet kısa not (sezon güncel)

editorialBacklinkTargets.angle: Mediterranean cruise feature, DE locale post
Istanbul guide update, FR locale post

sisterBrandConflict.rule: Captain Ahmet byline ONLY on MerrySails. GoldenSunset MUST have a different named captain. MerryTourism cruise content must use a third name OR pivot to non-Captain authorship (e.g., 'Cruise Operations Team' if no real third operator exists). Author name overlap across these 3 brands = scaled content abuse classifier signal.

everyCommercialPage: TÜRSAB A-805 license number visible (header or footer)
Captain Ahmet face photo + bio link on author byline
Original boat photos (EXIF preserved, no Unsplash)
everyPillarPage: 130-160 word self-contained answer block at top
FAQPage schema (AI signal — rich result öldü Mayıs 7 2026, schema KEEP)

notes: Mueller 2024 verbatim: 'separate websites not a problem' carve-out applies ONLY if quality bar uniform across all brands.
Same-city same-niche hard cap 6 brand / 12 ay (AST Tourism precedent = 3 brand).
FAQ schema KEEP (AI signal) even though rich result died May 7 2026 — Google docs verbatim: 'continue to use FAQ structured data to better understand pages'.
JSON-LD MUST be native <script type='application/ld+json'> lowercase, not Next.js <Script> capital S (Googlebot SSR'da görmez).
Information Gain test (US Patent 11,354,342 B2): each post must contain at least 1 paragraph not present in top-3 SERP results.
